gaps.summary: Canonical template bodies are lazily seeded from governed refs because no dedicated authoring and localisation control plane exists yet.
gaps.temporaryFallback: Publish deterministic seeded versions into the canonical registry on first use.

gaps.summary: Outcome analytics records are durable and typed, but warehouse or BI export is still a downstream consumer instead of a live subscriber in this task.
gaps.temporaryFallback: Keep analytics queryable from the command-api slice and export later from the same canonical records.
